overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima depicting a samurai character walking along a riverside path through an autumn landscape. The character travels from a campfire campsite past a canoe docking area, through wooded riverbanks, and into a fishing camp with green netting and wooden structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside campsite with campfire and canoe

events.description: character walks away from campfire area toward open riverbank
passing by wooden canoe with NPC workers on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily away from campfire along the riverbank, passing NPCs working on a canoe

notable_agents.action: two villagers working on a wooden canoe by the river

entered.detail: calm river flowing alongside the path
trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage
large wooden canoe being repaired on the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a riverside campsite with a burning campfire. The samurai character walks away from the camp along a dirt trail, passing NPC villagers working on a wooden canoe. The river flows calmly on the right, with autumn-colored trees lining the opposite bank and mountains visible in the distance.

events.description: entering denser tree cover along the riverbank
riverbank becomes rockier with tall grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooded riverbank path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a narrow dirt trail through dense autumn woodland. The trees form a partial canopy overhead while the river remains visible to the right. The campsite and canoe are left behind as the path winds through tall grass and rocky outcrops.

events.description: approaching fishing camp with green netting visible on the left
passing wooden barrels and drying racks in the fishing camp

agents.ego_description: walking through the fishing camp area, observing the green nets and wooden structures

entered.detail: large green fabric nets suspended on wooden poles for drying fish
wooden barrels with green covers along the riverbank
stone steps leading up the hillside

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a fishing camp where green drying nets are suspended on wooden poles to the left. Wooden barrels line the riverbank, and stone stairs become visible ahead leading up the hillside. The dense tree cover gives way to more open terrain with scattered autumn trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside path with fishing camp structures

events.description: beginning to ascend stone stairs on the left side of the path
moving deeper into the fishing camp area with more netting structures

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along the path, ascending stone steps through the fishing camp

entered.detail: rough wooden fence posts along the uphill path

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a hillside path through the fishing camp, walking alongside stone stairs and wooden fencing. The green fishing nets are now closer to the path on the left, while the river disappears from view behind. The terrain becomes more elevated with the mountain visible in the misty distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cozy riverside campsite into an elevated fishing outpost amidst an autumn landscape. It begins at a burning campfire, following the samurai as he walks along a dirt trail past villagers working on a wooden canoe beside a calm river. As the path winds away from the camp, the scene shifts into a dense woodland where autumn trees form a partial canopy over tall grass and rocky outcrops. The terrain then opens into a fishing camp characterized by green drying nets suspended from wooden poles and barrels lining the riverbank. Finally, the camera ascends a hillside path alongside stone stairs and wooden fencing, leaving the river behind as the view opens toward a misty mountain in the distance.
